title: VanillaPlus Animation
description: An optimized modpack with many improved animations and sounds.
body:
This Minecraft modpack brings your world to life with:

Enhanced animations: Smoother movements for players, mobs, and tools.

Improved sound effects: More immersive ambient sounds, realistic footsteps, and richer combat audio.

Greater immersion: Keeps the classic Minecraft feel while making the game more dynamic and lively.

Perfect for players who want to upgrade Minecraft’s visuals and audio without changing its core gameplay.
